summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing with 100% success rate. YouTube integration, video source deletion, and email alerts all working. Frontend has session management issues preventing complete UI testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Session expires quickly causing frequent redirects to login page during navigation
ui_bugs.selector: Login form keeps appearing after successful authentication

ui_bugs.issue: Unable to reliably access Settings page from dashboard - navigation seems broken or missing

integration_issues.issue: Cannot complete full UI testing due to session timeout preventing access to Settings page

passed_tests: Backend Authentication (admin login with demo credentials)
DELETE /api/video-sources/{source_id} (properly stops active streams before deletion)
YouTube stream URL extraction with yt-dlp integration
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend session management to prevent frequent login redirects. Ensure Settings page is properly accessible via navigation. The backend APIs are fully functional - focus on frontend session persistence and navigation routing.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (11/11 tests passed), Frontend: 30% (authentication works but navigation/session issues prevent full testing)
